data.title: BNB Drops Below 1,270 USDT with a 2.47% Decrease in 24 Hours
data.description: On Oct 09, 2025, 13:13 PM(UTC). According to Binance Market Data, BNB has dropped below 1,270 USDT and is now trading at 1,269.689941 USDT, with a narrowed 2.47% decrease in 24 hours.

data.title: The market value of BSC Ecosystem Meme Coin "Customer Service Xiao He" briefly exceeded US$50 million
data.description: According to GMGN data, the BSC ecosystem's Meme coin, "Customer Service Xiao He," has fallen back to $39.7 million, a 196.8% increase in one hour, possibly due to news of Binance Alpha's customer service representative Xiao He's launch. Odaily reminds users that Meme coin prices are subject to significant fluctuations, so investors should exercise caution.

data.description: According to the official website, Binance Alpha has launched PUP. Contract address: 0x73b84f7e3901f39fc29f3704a03126d317ab4444

data.title: Strategy plans to release its third-quarter earnings report on October 30.
data.description: Bitcoin Treasury company Strategy (formerly MicroStrategy) announced that it will release its third quarter 2025 financial results after the close of U.S. financial markets on Thursday, October 30, 2025. (Businesswire)

data.title: LBank has launched BNBHOLDER U-margined perpetual contracts
data.description: According to the official announcement, LBank launched the BNBHOLDER U-based perpetual contract for the first time at 16:00 (SGT) on October 9, 2025, with a maximum leverage of 20x.

data.title: Bitget has launched U-margined COAI and LYN perpetual contracts
data.description: According to an official announcement, Bitget has launched U-margined COAI and LYN perpetual contracts, both with a maximum leverage of 50x. Contract trading on BOT will also be available simultaneously.

data.title: Crypto compliance startup CipherOwl completes $15 million seed round of financing, led by General Catalyst and others
data.description: CipherOwl, a crypto compliance startup, announced the completion of a $15 million seed round of financing, led by General Catalyst and Flourish Ventures, with participation from Coinbase Ventures and Enlight Capital. The company's co-founder and CEO Leo Liang declined to disclose the valuation of this round of financing. (Fortune)

data.title: Amplify ETFs Launches Ethereum Options Income ETF and Income Covered Call ETF
data.description: ETF solutions provider Amplify ETFs announced the launch of the Amplify Ethereum Options Yield ETF (ETTY) and the Amplify Ethereum Yield Covered Call ETF (EHY). These ETFs track Ethereum (ETH) call options and covered call options, respectively, to provide growth exposure and consistent returns on ETH. (Globenewswire)

data.title: Strategy to Announce Third Quarter Financial Results for 2025
data.description: According to Foresight News, Strategy, formerly known as MicroStrategy and listed on Nasdaq, has announced that it will release its financial results for the third quarter of 2025. The announcement is scheduled for Thursday, October 30, 2025, following the close of U.S. financial markets.

data.title: Ethereum's Kohaku Roadmap Aims to Enhance Wallet Privacy and Security
data.description:
According to Cointelegraph, Ethereum developers have introduced Kohaku, a new roadmap designed to enhance wallet privacy and security through a modular framework. This initiative, announced by Ethereum Foundation coordinator Nicolas Consigny, focuses on creating a set of privacy and security primitives for the Ethereum ecosystem. Kohaku's primary objective is to develop a software development kit (SDK) for building secure wallet functions and a reference wallet to demonstrate these tools in practice. The initial version will be available as a browser extension based on the Ambire wallet, catering to advanced users seeking greater control and privacy.

Kohaku is being developed in collaboration with prominent teams within the Ethereum ecosystem, including Ambire, Railgun, DeFi Wonderland, Helios, and Oblivious Labs. The project is open source, inviting developers to contribute through its GitHub repositories. A key goal of Kohaku is to reduce wallets' reliance on centralized services that can track transactions. The project will feature private sending and receiving, IP address masking, separate accounts for each decentralized application (DApp), and peer-to-peer transaction broadcasting that bypasses standard remote procedure call (RPC) servers. Additionally, Kohaku plans to incorporate social recovery options using tools like ZK Email and Anon Aadhaar, facilitating access restoration without compromising privacy. ZK Email employs zero-knowledge proofs for anonymous email verification, while Anon Aadhaar enables privacy-preserving identity verification.

In the long term, the Kohaku team aims to enhance wallet security to the device level, described as "as close as possible to the silicon." This involves creating a native Ethereum browser where users can safely interact with DApps, IPFS content, and decentralized networks without data leaks. In a related development, the Ethereum Foundation has launched the Privacy Cluster, an initiative bringing together 47 leading researchers, engineers, and cryptographers to develop privacy features at the protocol level of the Ethereum network. This group will collaborate with the Privacy and Scaling Explorations (PSE) team to introduce tools such as private payments, confidential identity systems, and zero-knowledge infrastructure designed to protect user data directly on Ethereum's layer-1 blockchain. The Privacy Cluster encompasses multiple Ethereum Foundation and PSE initiatives, with Kohaku being one of them. Other notable projects include Private Reads & Writes, Private Proving, and Private Identities.

data.title: Spot Silver Reaches Record High of $50 Per Ounce
data.description: According to PANews, spot silver has surged to a historic high, reaching the $50 per ounce mark. This year, the precious metal has increased by over $21, marking a rise of more than 70% in 2025.

data.title: BlackRock's ETHA Ethereum holdings exceed 4 million, valued at over $18 billion
data.description: According to official data, after increasing its holdings by 97,695 ETH, the holdings of BlackRock's Ethereum exchange-traded fund ETHA have exceeded 4 million, reaching 4,083,485.9825 as of October 8, worth approximately US$18,165,836,576.8.

data.title: APENFT officially announced its upgrade to AINFT
data.description: APENFT officially announced its brand renewal today, officially transitioning to the AINFT phase, marking a pivotal step in its AI development. This upgrade not only represents a brand restructuring but also signals its commitment to driving innovation in digital art and Web 3 through intelligent technology. As a key component of the TRON ecosystem, AINFT will explore new frontiers in the integration of AI and blockchain, bringing a more intelligent, diverse, and tangible creative ecosystem to creators, developers, and the community.

data.title: DeFi Development to distribute dividends in the form of warrants and seek to raise $73.5 million to support SOL acquisition
data.description: Nasdaq-listed DeFi Development (DFDV) announced a special dividend in the form of warrants to holders of common stock as of October 23, 2025. Based on the outstanding common stock and convertible senior notes, the company expects to distribute up to approximately 3.3 million warrants, each entitling the holder to purchase one share of common stock at an exercise price of $22.50. Assuming all warrants are exercised, the company will receive $73.5 million to fund the acquisition of SOL and working capital. (Globenewswire)

data.title: Bank of America to Provide Reserve Custody for Anchorage’s Payment Stablecoin
data.description: Anchorage Digital Bank, a crypto-friendly digital bank, announced that Bank of America has become the reserve custody service provider for its payment stablecoin. It is reported that Anchorage Digital Bank is currently the first crypto-native bank to hold a U.S. federal charter and operates under the direct supervision of the U.S. Office of the Comptroller of the Currency (OCC). (Businesswire)

data.title: Credia officially launches Trust Alpha
data.description: Credia Layer officially launched on Trust Alpha at 11:00 AM (UTC) on October 9th. As the first project to be listed on Trust Alpha, Credia marks a milestone—it introduces the AI-powered, popular MEME search engine to the BNB ecosystem, ushering in a new chapter in the AI ​​Pilot for Trust Wallet's ecosystem launch. With this launch, users can now: • Participate in the $CRED Liquidity Pool • Stake $TWT to earn $CRED rewards • Experience AI pilot popular searches

data.title: Binance: 54.2 KGEN tokens will be added to the airdrop for users who successfully claimed it.
data.description: Binance announced on its X platform that it has airdropped an additional 54.2 KGEN tokens to users who successfully claimed the KGEN token airdrop.
